name: aigf
description: AIGF — 开源多 Agent 驱动 2D 游戏开发框架。Phaser 3 + TypeScript，含 AI 编排、生图/视频/音频/编程 Agent、验收回炉、Runway/Kling 资产管线与 CLI 工具链。
author: 阿卜杜热合曼的 <pfr314@qq.com>

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aigf/core && npm run build -w @aigf/llm && npm run build -w @aigf/providers && npm run build -w @aigf/pipeline && npm run build -w @aigf/orchestrator && npm run build -w @aigf/review && npm run build -w @aigf/agent-code && npm run build -w @aigf/agent-image && npm run build -w @aigf/agent-video && npm run build -w @aigf/agent-audio && npm run build -w @aigf/cli && npm run build -w @aigf/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @aigf/core && npm run test -w @aigf/llm && npm run test -w @aigf/providers && npm run test -w @aigf/orchestrator && npm run test -w @aigf/review && npm run test -w @aigf/pipeline && npm run test -w @aigf/cli
scripts.run:demo:full: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run "添加冰锥术技能动画" --project ./templates/phaser-2d --dry-run
scripts.validate: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate
scripts.run:demo: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run "添加冰锥术" --project ./templates/phaser-2d --dry-run
scripts.dashboard: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --project ./templates/phaser-2d
